record.name: Driver License Expiry Reminder
record.code: # Find drivers with license expiring in next 30 days from datetime import date, timedelta limit_date = date.today() + timedelta(days=30) drivers = env['transit.driver'].search([('license_expiry', '<=', limit_date), ('status', '!=', 'suspended')]) for driver in drivers: # Post a message or create an activity for safety officers/admin driver.message_post( body=f"WARNING: Driver {driver.name}'s license is expiring on {driver.license_expiry}. Please renew to prevent suspension.", subject="Driver License Expiry Warning" ) # Also record in notification model env['transit.notification'].create({ 'title': f"License Expiry: {driver.name}", 'description': f"License {driver.license_no} expires on {driver.license_expiry}.", 'priority': 'high', 'user_id': env.user.id })

record.name: Vehicle Insurance Expiry Reminder
record.code: from datetime import date, timedelta limit_date = date.today() + timedelta(days=30) vehicles = env['transit.vehicle'].search([('insurance_expiry', '<=', limit_date), ('status', '!=', 'retired')]) for vehicle in vehicles: vehicle.message_post( body=f"WARNING: Vehicle {vehicle.name} ({vehicle.registration_no}) insurance expires on {vehicle.insurance_expiry}. Please renew.", subject="Insurance Expiry Warning" ) env['transit.notification'].create({ 'title': f"Insurance Expiry: {vehicle.registration_no}", 'description': f"Insurance for {vehicle.name} expires on {vehicle.insurance_expiry}.", 'priority': 'high', 'user_id': env.user.id })

record.name: Maintenance Reminders
record.code: # Find pending maintenance tasks older than 7 days from datetime import date, timedelta limit_date = date.today() - timedelta(days=7) maintenance_records = env['transit.maintenance'].search([('status', '=', 'pending'), ('create_date', '<=', limit_date)]) for mnt in maintenance_records: mnt.message_post( body=f"Overdue Maintenance Approval: Task {mnt.name} for {mnt.vehicle_id.name} is still pending approval.", subject="Maintenance Approval Pending" ) env['transit.notification'].create({ 'title': f"Overdue Maintenance: {mnt.name}", 'description': f"Maintenance request for {mnt.vehicle_id.name} - '{mnt.issue}' requires immediate attention.", 'priority': 'medium', 'user_id': env.user.id })

record.name: Dispatched Trip Reminders
record.code: # Alert if trip dispatched for more than 48 hours is not completed from datetime import datetime, timedelta limit_date = datetime.now() - timedelta(hours=48) trips = env['transit.trip'].search([('status', '=', 'dispatched'), ('dispatch_date', '<=', limit_date)]) for trip in trips: trip.message_post( body=f"Alert: Trip {trip.name} has been dispatched since {trip.dispatch_date} and is still not marked completed.", subject="Delayed Trip Notification" ) env['transit.notification'].create({ 'title': f"Delayed Trip: {trip.name}", 'description': f"Route: {trip.source} to {trip.destination} with vehicle {trip.vehicle_id.name}.", 'priority': 'high', 'user_id': env.user.id })
